summary: Iteration 29: Tested SEO admin stale closure bug fix and image optimization in Gallery component. All features working correctly. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: Admin SEO settings correctly save both title_pl and og_image together (stale closure fix verified), /sauny Gallery shows 15 images, /balie page loads with products.
critical_code_review_comments: SaunaSeoAdmin.jsx: handleImageUpload now uses setSeoSettings(prev => ({...prev, [field]: url})) - functional update avoids stale closure
All onChange handlers in SaunaSeoAdmin.jsx use functional updates: setSeoSettings(prev => ({...prev, field: value}))
Gallery.jsx uses optimizedImg(url, {w: 500, q: 75}) for thumbnails and {w: 1200, q: 85} for lightbox
optimizedImg() in utils.js correctly only adds ?w=&q= params to /api/images/ URLs, not external URLs
Image optimization endpoint returns WebP: original 1.5MB → w=500,q=75: 51KB (30x compression)
context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO admin stale closure bug is fixed - handleImageUpload uses functional setState with field name parameter. Image optimization working via Pillow. GET /api/images/{id}?w=500&q=75 returns WebP. Gallery images from external sources (Cloudinary) don't get optimization params (correct behavior). /balie page loads slowly but works.

seo_settings_get_api.details: GET /api/settings/seo returns all SEO fields including og_image

seo_settings_put_api.details: PUT /api/admin/settings/seo saves og_image and title_pl together without overwriting

seo_admin_stale_closure_fix.details: Changed title_pl to TEST_SEO_Iteration29_Title and og_image to /api/images/b8ba1a99-40b7-4174-bac4-a7a955d5c1b3, both persisted after save and page refresh

gallery_section_sauny.details: /sauny page Gallery section shows 15 images. Images from Cloudinary (external) correctly don't get optimization params.

balie_page_loads.details: /balie page loads with hero section, product collection, and product cards visible.

about_section_image.details: About section uses optimizedImg(aboutImage, {w: 600, q: 80}) for image optimization.
